---
title: "Data Cleaning and Data Quality Management Review"
subtitle: "Dimensions, Profiling, Validation, Cleaning, Stewardship, Root Cause, and Monitoring"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Quality objective

Define the dataset, use case, quality dimensions, owners, thresholds, and materiality.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
email = "ADA@EXAMPLE.COM"
normalized_email = email.strip().lower()
print({"normalized_email": normalized_email})
```

## Quality checks

Review completeness, validity, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness, interpretability, and accessibility.

## Stewardship

Preserve incidents, root causes, rejected records, repair decisions, and unresolved uncertainty.

## Appendix

Attach raw records, quality rules, mappings, incidents, root-cause register, and generated summaries.
